title: Department Manager Vacancy at KFC India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at KFC India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
